methods.description: This method describes the extraction and analysis of PCBs from sediment cultures to determine their concentration and dechlorination rates.

steps.description: PCBs were batch extracted in duplicate from each replicate culture according to procedures described elsewhere.
steps.searchable_summary: extract PCBs from sediment cultures using established procedures

steps.description: GC-ECD analyses of extracted PCBs were performed under the analytical conditions described in literature.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze extracted PCBs using GC-ECD

steps.description: Qualitative analysis was performed by comparing retention times of parent PCBs and their dechlorination products with standard mixtures.
steps.searchable_summary: perform qualitative analysis of PCBs by comparing retention times

steps.description: Quantitative analyses were performed using the GC-ECD response factor of each PCB, obtained from linear five-points calibration curves.
steps.searchable_summary: perform quantitative analysis using GC-ECD response factors

steps.description: PCB concentrations and dechlorination rates were calculated assuming co-eluting congeners to be present in equal proportions.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate PCB concentrations and dechlorination rates

steps.description: Biogas production was measured at each sampling with an airtight glass syringe.
steps.searchable_summary: measure biogas production using a glass syringe

steps.description: Biogas composition was determined via µGC-TCD as described previously.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze biogas composition using µGC-TCD

steps.description: Sulfate concentration in the water phase was determined with IC-CD.
steps.searchable_summary: determine sulfate concentration using IC-CD

methods.method_name: Community Analysis by PCR-DGGE of the 16S rRNA Gene
methods.description: This method involves extracting DNA from sediment samples and analyzing the bacterial community structure using PCR-DGGE.

steps.description: Total DNA was extracted from the wet sediment using the UltraClean Soil DNA kit.
steps.searchable_summary: extract DNA from sediment using UltraClean Soil DNA kit

steps.description: Total DNA was quantified using Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit with a Qubit 3.0 fluorimeter.
steps.searchable_summary: quantify DNA using Qubit dsDNA HS Assay Kit

steps.description: 16S rRNA genes were PCR-amplified with specific primers.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify 16S rRNA genes using PCR

steps.description: DGGE of PCR products was performed in polyacrylamide gels.
steps.searchable_summary: perform DGGE on PCR products

steps.description: Community richness and organization indexes were calculated from DGGE image analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate community richness and organization from DGGE images

steps.description: Prominent DGGE gel bands were cut, DNA eluted, re-amplified, and resolved again in DGGE.
steps.searchable_summary: process DGGE gel bands for further analysis

steps.description: Amplicons were purified and sequenced.
steps.searchable_summary: purify and sequence amplicons

steps.description: Each 16S rRNA gene sequence was aligned to the bacterial 16S rRNA database and phylogenetic affiliation obtained.
steps.searchable_summary: align sequences to 16S rRNA database and determine phylogenetic affiliation

methods.method_name: Preparation and Sampling of Sediment Cultures
methods.description: This method outlines the preparation of anaerobic sediment cultures and their sampling for various analyses.

steps.description: A set of anaerobic slurry cultures was prepared using site water for sediment re-suspension under nitrogen atmosphere.
steps.searchable_summary: prepare anaerobic slurry cultures with site water

steps.description: Sediment cultures were spiked with Aroclor 1254 to favor PCB-respiring bacteria.
steps.searchable_summary: spike sediment cultures with Aroclor 1254

steps.description: Sediment cultures were incubated statically in the dark at 28 °C for 31 weeks.
steps.searchable_summary: incubate sediment cultures in the dark at 28 °C

steps.description: Cultures were periodically sampled to analyze biogas volume and composition, PCB congeners and concentration, sulfate concentration, and microbial community structure.
steps.searchable_summary: periodically sample cultures for various analyses
